final_answer: Action may proceed. DEL-WRE-077 provides exact delegation authority matching vendor Wren Services, 12-month renewal term, and USD 50000 ceiling for the USD 49750 renewal, signed 2026-06-27 before release. STD-WRE-077-P confirms committee review is unnecessary below the ceiling. The warning WARN-WRE-077 notes the near-threshold condition but does not alter the closed boundary. All source records bind the release as authorized. No open blockers remain.
